question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions. It dumps a complete implementation upfront, then explains. The student is the one asking questions, which inverts the didactic dynamic.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are posed by the Tutor at all, so there are no choices framed for the student. The student happens to surface the interesting invariant question themselves.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolded sequence — the full solution and tests are revealed in turn 1. No gradient, no withheld spoilers.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the Tutor's response to the student's invariant question is genuinely illuminating (size-neutral update insight, table). But the conversation is mostly monologue + student summary rather than back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
